---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or architectural shift (e.g., Docker to Slurm)
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what the current limitation is. 
*(e.g., "Docker containers are hitting memory limits on the local head node.")*

## ✨ Proposed Solution
Describe the evolution. How does this improve the project?

## 🏗️ Technical Implementation
- [ ] Infrastructure Changes (Terraform/Slurm scripts)
- [ ] Dependency Updates (`uv` sync)
- [ ] Testing/Validation Plan

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any architectural diagrams or links to documentation here.
